query:
SELECT 
  id, username, name, email, role, plan, loginMethod,
  createdAt, lastSignedIn
FROM users
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user UpQ6nzGwi5FMPrH.root --database CRyFQH5qGudysyWQuRqoNj --execute 
SELECT 
  id, username, name, email, role, plan, loginMethod,
  createdAt, lastSignedIn
FROM users
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
